# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(unittests)
add_subdirectory(tests)

add_library(library-cpp-tables)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-tables PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-tables PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-yt-misc
  flow-lib-serializer
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-misc
  library-profiling-sensors_owner
)

target_sources(library-cpp-tables PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/common.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/compact_output_messages.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/compact_partition_output_messages.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/context.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/input_messages.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/key_states.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/key_visitor_states.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/partition_states.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/state.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/timers.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/transaction_manager.cpp
)
